summary: open-agents-ai ships postinstall daemon performing host reconnaissance and HTTP beaconing
details: The package's package.json declares both `preinstall` and `postinstall` lifecycle hooks that invoke curl, and ships dist/postinstall-daemon.cjs — a Node script executed at install time that loads child_process, fs, http, and os, captures host identity (os.userInfo()), runs system commands via execSync, executes ping probes, and issues outbound http.request() GET calls. The combination of install-time lifecycle execution, host-identity collection, command execution, and unsolicited network beaconing is consistent with an installer-side reconnaissance / exfiltration payload rather than any documented package functionality. Installing or building any project that depends on this package will trigger the daemon and leak host metadata to the hardcoded endpoints.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
